role: VP for Cultural Heritage, Handicrafts and Tourism (2012–2013)
bio:
Mohammad Sharif Malekzadeh served as Vice President and head of the [Cultural Heritage, Handicrafts and Tourism Organization](/orgs/cultural-heritage-organization) from 2012 to 2013 under President [Mahmoud Ahmadinejad](/people/mahmoud-ahmadinejad). He was a close associate of [Esfandiar Rahim Mashaei](/people/esfandiar-rahim-mashaei) and part of the inner circle that managed cultural heritage affairs throughout the Ahmadinejad presidency, alongside [Hamid Baghaei](/people/hamid-baghaei).

Malekzadeh's appointment continued the pattern of Mashaei loyalists controlling the Cultural Heritage Organization, which had served as a power base for the 'deviant current' faction.
editorial_notes: Close associate of Mashaei. Some sources describe as Mashaei's relative but this is unconfirmed.
